title: Build unified API gateway for all products
description: Single gateway: auth, routing, rate limiting, billing, analytics. Handles all products.
result:
Built RoadGateway - Enterprise API management and developer platform (Product #79). Live at https://2a146c97.blackroad-admin.pages.dev

Features:
- Intelligent routing with load balancing and automatic failover
- Real-time analytics dashboard with latency percentiles
- API key management with auto-rotation and scoped permissions
- Developer portal with auto-generated OpenAPI/Swagger docs
- Rate limiting & quotas (token bucket, sliding window)
- Request/response transformation (JSON/XML, protocol translation)
- Security (DDoS protection, IP whitelisting, TLS termination)
- Global edge network (300+ PoPs worldwide)
- Webhook management with retries
- 10B+ requests/day capacity, <5ms P99 latency, 99.99% uptime SLA

Pricing: $49/mo Starter → $199/mo Pro → Custom Enterprise

🤖 Built with Claude Code | Product #79 of 200+
